approved_by: human governance decision to register BUILD-002 workstreams as expeditions E11–E20

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

changes.change: Registered TASKPRO-BUILD-002 as supporting evidence for the release-engineering roadmap (docs/roadmaps/BUILD-002.md).
changes.justification: BUILD-002 is the repository artifact that demands the E11–E20 transformations; it must be traceable from Expedition evidence_sources.

changes.change: Added E11, E12, E13 as completed expeditions with supporting replay references. Added E14–E20 as registered expeditions with dependencies and credential gates.
changes.justification: W11–W13 were executed without prior expedition registration; retroactive registration restores provenance. W14–W20 are the remaining BUILD-002 workstreams and require explicit gates before execution.

changes.change: Updated phase.claim to reflect product implementation complete, release engineering in progress, E11–E13 completed, and E14–E20 registered.
changes.justification: State must accurately describe the governed lifecycle after expedition registration.

invariants_verified: knowledge/ untouched: input snapshot hash identical to genesis-0001.
No implementation capabilities invoked during this governance update.
Every new expedition traces to TASKPRO-BUILD-002 and/or TASKPRO-OPS-001 evidence.
Completed expeditions E11–E13 are backed by replay records bootstrap-e11-0025, bootstrap-e12-0026, bootstrap-e13-0027.
